summary: Reworked wireframe system to vertex-and-edge topology. Extracted hashRandomFromPosition into a shared helper and switched all generators (polyhedraEdges, geodesicSphere, nestedSolids) from PRNG-based to position-based aRandom hashing so the same vertex always gets the same deformation. Created extractUniqueVertices utility to deduplicate edge endpoints into unique vertex positions. Created wireframeVertex.vert.glsl (identical deformation pipeline to wireframe.vert.glsl plus gl_PointSize computation) and wireframeVertex.frag.glsl (soft circular points with wireframe palette coloring). Modified wireframePolyhedra.ts to create paired Points + LineSegments meshes per polyhedron sharing position/rotation, with both materials receiving the same uniform updates. Added WIREPOLYHEDRA_VERTEX_ATTRIBUTES to shader registry. All 1496 tests pass, build succeeds.
